title: Real gundams, top 3D generator, open-source world models, ChatGPT updates, new TTS: AI NEWS
summary: AI Search covers a broad range of recent AI innovations including 3D generation (Pixal3D), world models (SANA-WM), video generation (Krea2), text-to-speech (DramaBox, Scenema), robotics (Unitree mecha), and ChatGPT finance features. The episode highlights both open-source and commercial AI tools.
